instructors.name: Hazrat Mufti Abu Bakar Jabir Qasmi
instructors.title: Chief Adviser
instructors.bio: Hazrat Mufti Abu Bakar Jabir Qasmi serves as the Chief Adviser at Islamic Hubb, providing strategic guidance and spiritual oversight to ensure the institution upholds the highest standards of Islamic scholarship and education.
qualifications: Takhasus fil Fiqh from Darul Uloom Deoband

instructors.name: Mufti Muhammad Kafeel Ahmed
instructors.title: Director
instructors.bio: Mufti Muhammad Kafeel Ahmed leads the operational and academic direction of Islamic Hubb, ensuring that programs meet the needs of students while maintaining the highest educational standards.
qualifications: Takhasus fil Fiqh from Darul Uloom Deoband

instructors.name: Mufti Ibrahim Qasmi
instructors.title: Principal & Head of Alimiyat
instructors.bio: Mufti Ibrahim leads Islamic Hubb's academic vision, overseeing the Alimiyat curriculum and mentoring senior students in fiqh and tafsir.
qualifications: Takhasus fil Fiqh from Darul Uloom Deoband

instructors.name: Sheikh Muhammad Arshad
instructors.title: Head of Quran Memorization
instructors.bio: Sheikh Muhammad supervises the Hifz department and ensures every student receives disciplined revision plans and tajweed refinement.

instructors.name: Ustadha Maryam Siddiq
instructors.title: Director of Women's Programs
instructors.bio: Ustadha Maryam designs and leads the Momina program, empowering women through Quranic learning, family guidance, and spiritual development.

instructors.name: Maulana Saifullah Nadwi
instructors.title: Academic Coordinator
instructors.bio: Maulana Saifullah oversees curriculum planning, teacher training, and student assessments across all long-term and short-term courses.
